clinic.name: Shraddha Clinic
clinic.fullName: Shraddha Clinic - Advanced Family Practice & Medical Center
clinic.heroTitle: Your Family's Health is Our Highest Priority
clinic.heroSubtitle: Experience modern, personalized primary healthcare in Vadodara. Led by experienced physicians Dr. Roshan Rana and Dr. Komal Rana, we provide expert medical diagnostics, pediatric care, and complete wellness counseling.

doctor.name: Dr. Roshan Rana & Dr. Komal Rana
doctor.bioLarge: Dr. Roshan Rana and Dr. Komal Rana are board-certified practitioners at Shraddha Clinic, recognized for their professionalism, expertise, and deep understanding of their patients' medical histories. They are dedicated to delivering patient-centric, empathetic healthcare solutions.
doctor.bioMedium: Serving the Waghodia, Vadodara area, they specialize in preventative care, chronic illness management, pediatric healthcare, and family health planning, ensuring comprehensive support at every stage of life.

contact.description: Conveniently located on Indrapuri Road, Waghodia. Walk-ins welcome for consultations and general checkups.
contact.hours:
Monday – Saturday: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM, 5:00 PM – 8:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

services.title: General Consultation
services.description: Routine wellness checkups, primary care diagnoses, preventive advice, and customized personal health plans.

services.title: Pediatric Care
services.description: Specialized medical services for infants, children, and teens, ensuring healthy physical & mental development.

services.title: Comprehensive Health Checkup
services.description: General health screenings, blood pressure checks, diabetes monitoring, and lifestyle guidance.

testimonials.text: "Dr. Roshan Rana and Dr. Komal Rana are highly praised for their professionalism, expertise, and thorough understanding of patients' medical history. The doctors have provided exceptional care for my family."
testimonials.author: Aarav Patel

testimonials.text: "Exceptional care and very experienced doctors. They explain the root cause of issues and don't prescribe unnecessary medicine. The clinic is highly recommended!"
testimonials.author: Kavita Shah

testimonials.text: "I visit Shraddha Clinic for my children's pediatric checkups. Dr. Komal is extremely gentle and patient. The booking system was very straightforward."
testimonials.author: Rajesh Mehta
